'''Rokna''' was [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa's]] [[Bordok/Legends|bordok]]. Kneesaa took Rokna with her when looking for her long-lost sister, [[Asha/Legends|Asha]].<ref name="Asha" />
